item.title: Welcome to Heiman Technology
item.description: Welcome to Heiman Technology! This is the official knowledge base of Heiman Technology, bringing together product documentation, technical solutions, industry news, and company updates.
item.content:encoded:
Welcome to Heiman Technology! This is the official knowledge base of Heiman Technology, bringing together product documentation, technical solutions, industry news, and company updates.

About This Site​

Heiman Technology is dedicated to providing partners, developers, and customers with one-stop technical resources to help you quickly learn about:

  • Product Center — Full range of smart fire, smart gas, smart elderly care, and smart sensing products
  • Solutions — Industry-level smart security solutions
  • Technical Documentation — API integration guides, SDK usage instructions, installation and deployment manuals
  • Industry Insights — Cutting-edge trends and policy analysis in smart security

Quick Navigation​

  • View Product Line to learn about Heiman's product range
  • Read Company Overview to learn about Heiman's development history
  • Visit Heiman Official Website for more information

If you have any questions, please call customer service hotline 400-8959-500 or contact online customer service.

item.title: Heiman Matter Smart Smoke Alarm Officially Launched
item.description: Heiman Technology's next-generation Matter smart smoke alarm HS1SA-M has been officially launched, making it one of the first smoke alarm products in the industry to receive Matter 1.2 certification.
item.content:encoded:
Heiman Technology's next-generation Matter smart smoke alarm HS1SA-M has been officially launched, making it one of the first smoke alarm products in the industry to receive Matter 1.2 certification.

tipp

HS1SA-M supports four major smart home ecosystems: Apple HomeKit, Amazon Alexa, Google Home, and Samsung SmartThings.

Key Features​

  • Matter 1.2 Certified — Cross-brand, cross-ecosystem interoperability
  • Photoelectric Smoke Sensing — Rapid response to various fire smoke types
  • Voice Alarm Alerts — Multiple language options for clear hazard communication
  • Self-Test Function — Periodic self-checks to ensure normal operation
  • Remote Notification — Real-time push alerts via mobile app

Compatibility​

HS1SA-M seamlessly integrates with mainstream smart home platforms, allowing users to control and manage it directly via their smartphones without the need for an additional gateway.

For more details, visit Product Line.

item.title: Heiman Technology Development Milestones
item.description: Since its founding in 2005, Heiman Technology has journeyed over 20 years of development. This article takes you through Heiman's key milestones.
item.content:encoded:
Since its founding in 2005, Heiman Technology has journeyed over 20 years of development. This article takes you through Heiman's key milestones.

2005 - Company Founded​

Shenzhen Heiman Technology Co., Ltd. was officially established, entering the security and sensing field.

2006 - International Expansion​

Multiple products received EU CE certification, and a partnership was established with China Mobile.

2011 - International Certification Breakthrough​

Multiple products passed EU EN54-7 and EN14604 certification, marking product quality reaching international advanced standards.

2012 - Smart Home Transformation​

The smart home project was fully launched, transitioning Heiman into a company focused on R&D, production, and sales of smart home products.

2017 - Major Breakthroughs​

  • Developed China's first NB-IoT smoke alarm
  • Won 2 German Red Dot Design Awards
  • Obtained MFi certification and Apple manufacturer qualification

2020 - Capital Boost​

Completed Series A funding round with Shenzhen HTI Group as investor, received "Guangdong Province Specialized and New SME" designation.

2022 - National Recognition​

Recognized as a national "Little Giant" enterprise; K1 series won German Red Dot Design Award.

2023 - International Standards Leadership​

Heiman testing laboratory officially passed national CNAS accreditation; smoke alarms and CO alarms were among the first to receive Matter 1.2 certification.

2024 - Present​

Continuous innovation, deeply engaged in smart fire safety, smart gas safety, smart elderly care, and smart sensing, providing quality products and services to customers in 100+ countries worldwide.

item.title: Heiman Technology Recognized as National "Little Giant" Enterprise
item.description: In 2022, Heiman Technology was officially recognized as a national "Little Giant" enterprise (Specialized and New) for its deep technical expertise and innovation capabilities in the smart sensing field.
item.content:encoded:
In 2022, Heiman Technology was officially recognized as a national "Little Giant" enterprise (Specialized and New) for its deep technical expertise and innovation capabilities in the smart sensing field.

This national-level recognition is a high affirmation of Heiman's specialization, refinement, differentiation, and innovation. Heiman will continue to deepen its focus on smart fire safety, smart gas safety, smart elderly care, and smart sensing, consistently delivering quality products and services to customers.

Previously, Heiman Technology had already received several authoritative qualifications including National High-Tech Enterprise and Guangdong Province Specialized and New SME certifications.
